description: A horizontal observance/awareness-day graphic with a soft pale-yellow background. Centered top text in grey sans-serif reads 'JUNE 20, 2024,' below it in large blue serif italic-styled text 'World Refugee Day.' The lower-center features a flat illustrated planet Earth (blue oceans, green continents showing North/South America) ringed by an arc of brown/tan footprint and shoe-print symbols walking around the globe, symbolizing migration and refugee journeys. The white DHS (Department of Homeland Security) seal sits in the bottom-right corner. This is a designed commemorative graphic marking World Refugee Day, using warm colors and walking-footprint imagery to convey a sympathetic, humanitarian message about welcoming refugees; target audience is the general public, signaling agency support for refugee protection (note: this is Biden-era DHS messaging from 2024).
